Comfortable Accommodation: Upper House Boutique Guesthouse in Clarens offers recently renovated rooms with private bathrooms, garden or mountain views, and modern amenities. Each room includes a fireplace, tea and coffee maker, and free WiFi.
Exceptional Facilities: Guests enjoy a beautiful garden, outdoor seating area, and free on-site private parking. Additional services include private check-in and check-out, ski equipment hire, and live music.
Delicious Breakfast: A full English or Irish breakfast is available, including vegetarian, vegan, halal, gluten-free, kosher, and other dietary options. Breakfast is served in the room, ensuring a pleasant start to the day.
Prime Location: Located 25 km from Golden Gate Highlands National Park and 2.
